name: Mamma’s Baked Vegetables

ingredients.item: medium leeks, white, tender parts only, halved lengthways, rinsed well under running water
small cauliflower, broken into small florets

method: Serves 4 2 medium leeks, white, tender parts only, halved lengthways, rinsed well under running water ½ small Savoy cabbage, sliced ½ small cauliflower, broken into small florets 4 stems broccolini 1 small sweet potato, thinly sliced 300 ml cream sea salt and ground black pepper 200 g freshly grated parmigiano 70 g unsalted butter
Bake in the oven for about 25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and golden on top.
